tasks.label: Create NestJS Backend
tasks.command: mkdir -p /Users/john/develop/health-interoperability-switch/backend && cd /Users/john/develop/health-interoperability-switch/backend && npm init -y && npm install @nestjs/core @nestjs/common @nestjs/platform-express reflect-metadata rxjs typescript ts-node @types/node --save && npm install @nestjs/cli --save-dev
